title: Operator loop plan surfaces staged rank-2 scan window config
problem: Ticket-254 added RGE_STAGED_RANK2_SCAN_MAX but operator_loop plan JSON does not expose the resolved scan window; operators must read runtime config docs to know active rank-2 selection depth.
acceptance_criteria: operator_loop --mode plan JSON includes staged_rank2_scan_max from load_config
Unit test asserts default and env override appear in plan output
Golden pass; no live LLM or public export changes
rollback_plan: Revert operator_loop plan field and unit test.
